nasb.text: Yet You have made him a little lower than God, And You crown him with glory and majesty!

esv.text: Yet you have made him a little lower than the heavenly beings and crowned him with glory and honor.

cnv.text: 你使他比天使低微一點， 卻賜給他榮耀尊貴作冠冕。

ccb.text: 你叫他比天使低微一点， 赐他荣耀和尊贵作冠冕。

csbs.text: 你使他比神低微一点， 赐给他荣耀威严为冠冕。
